# isAllItemsPlaylist

**Instance Property**

Indicates whether the API exposes every item in the playlist.

## Declaration

```swift
var isAllItemsPlaylist: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

This property always returns [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].

## Deprecated

- **isMaster**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the playlist represents the entire iTunes library.
- **ITLibPlaylistPropertyMaster**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the playlist represents the entire iTunes library.
